opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face has turned completely dark brown over the last two days. It looks like a giant, spreading skin cancer across both my cheeks and forehead. I'm terrified.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It got dramatically darker over the weekend after I was at the beach and I panicked — I've been having panic attacks about it and I can't calm down.

symptom_narrative.onset: I first noticed faint brownish patches on my cheeks a few months ago, but they went really dark over the last two days
symptom_narrative.duration: the patches have been there a few months, the dark colour is the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: flat brown patches — the skin doesn't feel any different, it's just the colour
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the colour looks really dramatic and dark to me, but it doesn't hurt at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across both cheeks, my forehead, and above my top lip — it's the same on both sides of my face
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it's been slowly there but got much darker after a weekend outside in the sun
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it seemed to go darker straight after a full weekend at the beach
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no itch, no pain, no flaking — just the dark colour and I'm really anxious about it
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I keep checking it in the mirror and I've been too anxious to go to work

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a contraceptive pill I started about 3 months ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spent the whole weekend outdoors at the beach; very stressed and anxious since the patches darkened

objective_data_offered.value: on video, symmetrical light-to-dark brown flat patches across both cheeks, the central forehead and the skin above the upper lip; the surface looks smooth with no crusting, scaling or raised areas; edges blend gradually into normal skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video call only; colour and detail depend on lighting and camera quality

objective_data_offered.value: patient appears tearful and distressed, repeatedly looking at her face in a hand mirror
partner says the patches are the same on both sides of her face and that the palms of her hands and her gums look their normal colour
